# liter-lm

> Universal LLM API client for 100+ LLM providers with polyglot bindings.

## About

liter-lm provides unified access to 100+ LLM providers with a single API. Built in Rust with thin bindings for every major platform.

API keys are configured once at client construction and provider routing is automatic based on model name prefixes.

## Organization

Part of the kreuzberg.dev ecosystem:
- **Kreuzberg** — Document intelligence: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/kreuzberg
- **html-to-markdown** — HTML to Markdown converter: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/html-to-markdown
- **liter-lm** — Universal LLM API client (this repo): https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/liter-lm

## Links

- Website: https://kreuzberg.dev
- Documentation: https://docs.liter-lm.kreuzberg.dev
- Discord: https://discord.gg/xt9WY3GnKR
- Contact: naaman@kreuzberg.dev

## Key APIs

- `chat(messages, config)` — Send a chat request and receive a response
- `chat_stream(messages, config)` — Stream a chat response
- `embeddings(texts, config)` — Generate embeddings
- `list_models()` — List available models for the configured provider
- `ChatConfig` — Configure model, temperature, max tokens, tools, etc.
- `ClientConfig` — Configure API key, base URL, timeouts, retry logic

## Available From

Rust (crates.io), Python (PyPI), Node.js (npm), Go (pkg.go.dev), Java (Maven Central), C# (NuGet), Ruby (RubyGems), Elixir (Hex.pm), PHP (Packagist), WebAssembly (npm), C FFI

## Supported Providers

100+ providers including: OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, Mistral, Cohere, Together AI, Fireworks, Perplexity, DeepSeek, Google Gemini, and many more.
